source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
The storm made a hole on the front side of the roof. There were 10 roof tiles in each of 7 rows. How many tiles are left on the front side of the roof?
<image1>
extraction_notes: Question includes <image1> and the quantity of tiles left depends on the depicted hole.

image_dependency: The question asks how many tiles are left after a storm hole, but the number of missing tiles is not stated in text and must be obtained from the image
asset_registry_record.registry_passed=true and an image asset is present
multi_step: The text provides a total-tile structure (10 tiles in each of 7 rows), which requires computing a total
The hole size must be determined visually from the image, then combined with the text-based total
This implies at least two steps: visual counting/identification and arithmetic subtraction
verifiability: answer_type is numeric and answer_text is a single clear value: 57
The expected solution structure is checkable: compute 10×7, determine missing tiles from image, subtract to verify the result
asset_registry_record shows question and answer present, with registry_passed=true
